parameters.query:
SELECT 
    md.*, 
    hpd.procedure_dataupload
FROM 
    mes.machine_data md
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.history_procedure_detail hpd 
    ON md.history_procedure_id = hpd.history_procedure_id
WHERE 
    md.machine_data_id = {{ $json.machine_data_id }}

nodes.name: 判断是否为绑定的数据

conditions.rightValue: 成品功能测试-气压计校准测试/充电电流/功耗测试

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    md.machine_data_id
FROM 
    mes.machine_data md
WHERE 
    md.procedure_detail_id IN (
        SELECT hpd.procedure_detail_id
        FROM mes.history_procedure_detail hpd
        WHERE hpd.procedure_name IN ( '合彩盒，装封套、称重')
    )
    AND md.retroid_id = {{ $json.retroid_id }}
  ORDER BY md.machine_data_id DESC
  limit 1
  ;

nodes.name: 查询是否存在包装数据

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    md.machine_data_id
FROM 
    mes.machine_data md
WHERE 
    md.procedure_detail_id IN (
        SELECT hpd.procedure_detail_id
        FROM mes.history_procedure_detail hpd
        WHERE hpd.procedure_name IN ( '合彩盒，装封套、称重')
    )
    AND md.retroid_id = {{ $json.retroid_id }};

parameters.query:
SELECT * 
FROM mes.machine_data md 
WHERE md.data ->> 'machine_data_id_old' = '{{ $json.machine_data_id }}' -- 再在小范围内筛选
  AND md.procedure_detail_id IN (
      SELECT pd.procedure_detail_id 
      FROM mes.procedure_detail pd  
      WHERE pd.procedure_name IN ('包装数据删除')
  );

parameters.query:
SELECT * 
FROM mes.machine_data md 
WHERE md.data ->> 'machine_data_id_old' = '{{ $json.machine_data_id }}' -- 再在小范围内筛选
  AND md.procedure_detail_id IN (
      SELECT pd.procedure_detail_id 
      FROM mes.procedure_detail pd  
      WHERE pd.procedure_name IN ('包装数据删除')
  );
